data.description: Thailand’s Commerce Minister forecasts exports could fall roughly 1% or stay unchanged this year.

data.title: Haier, the world's No.1 major home appliance brand, partners with Australian Open 2026, showcasing innovation and purpose.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia on January 25, 2026, Haier, the top major home appliance brand globally, confirms its ongoing collaboration with the Australian Open for the year 2026. The partnership highlights Haier's presence at the renowned sporting event, taking place at Melbourne Park.

data.title: US FDA grants Priority Review to BioArctic AB's partner Eisai for Leqembi Iqlik subcutaneous autoinjector, weekly starting dose.
data.description: On January 25, 2026, BioArctic AB's (publ) (STO: BIOA B) collaborator Eisai revealed that the supplemental Biologics License Application (sBLA) for the Leqembi Iqlik subcutaneous autoinjector (SC-AI) with a weekly initial dose has received Priority Review approval in the United States.

data.title: Crypto startup Entropy, backed by A16z, ceases operations. Founder Tux Pacific states the project, in 4 years, couldn't secure a sustainable model. Investors to receive refunds.
data.description: After four years of operation and numerous changes in direction, the founder and CEO of Entropy, Tux Pacific, disclosed that the project struggled to identify a sustainable business model.

data.title: HKMA increases RMB facility to 200B Yuan due to high demand from 40 banks, broadening yuan presence to ASEAN, Europe.
data.description: Hong Kong's central bank has increased its RMB liquidity facility to RMB200 billion, doubling the initial amount, as 40 banks have already used up their quotas. This move aims to broaden the offshore yuan's presence in regions like ASEAN and Europe.

data.title: DigiFT launches first actively managed tokenized equity fund with BNY, extending to professionally managed public equity strategies on Ethereum for eligible investors.
data.description: A new actively managed tokenized equity fund has been launched, marking a move beyond single asset tokenization to include professionally managed public equity strategies. The fund is tokenized on the Ethereum blockchain and distributed via DigiFT, offering eligible investors a regulated on-chain method to invest. This innovative approach aims to promote institutional adoption of tokenized assets and could potentially transform the traditional investment landscape.

data.title: Sudamala Resorts in Bali integrates solar power in efforts to promote sustainable tourism and coral restoration programs.
data.description: In Bali, Indonesia, on January 26, 2026, Sudamala Resorts, a set of culturally inspired boutique resorts in Indonesia, is dedicated to promoting sustainable tourism. They are actively implementing environmental projects to enhance guest experiences while prioritizing conservation efforts.
